title: The Siphoned Truth — brand identity, tone guide, output structure
narrative: Brand identity and tone guide for The Siphoned Truth investigative series.
telemetry: TONE: Clinical adversarial analysis; dry, unsentimental, evidence-first
AUDIENCE: Readers who question official narratives and want raw telemetry
TOPIC: Geopolitical events, conflicts, financial anomalies, infrastructure failures
VERDICT: Sharp one-line conclusion derived from physical evidence vs. official claims
DATA SOURCES: Transponder feeds, satellite imagery, sensor logs, financial telemetry
OUTPUT: JSON + formatted report, stored in /home/trevo/blog/content/articles/
analysis: The Siphoned Truth format was established through 20+ consecutive articles produced May 9 2026. Each follows this exact structure: PUBLIC NARRATIVE (official mainstream statement), TELEMETRY FEED (bullet breakdown of physical data), ADVERSARIAL ANALYSIS (how telemetry contradicts official narrative), VERDICT (sharp one-line conclusion). The format is self-evidently operational through its live output.
verdict: [SIPHONED VERDICT]: The Siphoned Truth format is defined by its output, not its design document — and that output is already live.
